ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.
title: Form remains keyboard accessible with clear labels
preconditions: Account module is available in a stable test environment.
Keyboard and screen-reader checks can be performed.
steps: Navigate the form using keyboard-only interaction.
Check labels, focus order, and actionable controls.
Attempt key success and validation paths.
expected_result: Core form interactions remain accessible with clear labels, focus behavior, and feedback.

ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.
title: Unauthorized role cannot use edit action from UI
preconditions: Account module is available in a stable test environment.
User is logged in without update permission.
test_data: Use values relevant to the visible fields and validation messages.
steps: Open the profile screen.
Attempt to access edit controls and save a change.
Observe UI permissions and messages.
expected_result: Edit action is hidden, disabled, or denied with a clear authorization message and no update occurs.

ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.
title: Unauthorized token is blocked by API
preconditions: Account module is available in a stable test environment.
A valid token without required permission is available.
test_data: Use request payloads and tokens aligned to the scenario.
steps: Prepare a valid update payload.
Call the update API with an unauthorized token.
Inspect status code and error payload.
expected_result: API returns 401 or 403 and no data is updated.

ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.
title: Direct backend or integration bypass is denied
preconditions: Account module is available in a stable test environment.
A direct backend or integration endpoint is known.
Caller lacks update permission.
test_data: Use a record that can be traced through payload, mapping, or downstream status.
steps: Attempt to invoke the backend or integration path directly.
Observe status, logs, and downstream effects.
Verify record state and audit behavior.
expected_result: Direct bypass is denied and no data or audit change is created.

ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.
title: Unauthenticated request is denied cleanly
preconditions: Account module is available in a stable test environment.
No valid session or token is provided.
test_data: Use request payloads and tokens aligned to the scenario.
steps: Attempt to call the update API without authentication.
Inspect the response status and body.
Verify no side effects occurred.
expected_result: Authentication failure is returned and the system remains unchanged.
